text:
```json
[
  "Marcus Mah Qing Fung (Universiti Malaya) is associated with the Innovation Track presentation.",
  "Team Wassup presented the Innovation Track.",
  "Team Wassup members include Tan Shan Chien, Look Kai Yang, and Chiang Cheng Han, all from Universiti Malaya.",
  "Ahmad is a small-scale contractor.",
  "Ahmad received a 40-page legal notice about new safety and labour laws.",
  "Ahmad has limited access to legal help and must submit five forms by Friday to avoid losing his business license.",
  "The legal language in the notice is complex, technical, and overwhelming.",
  "This situation represents the \"Compliance Gap\".",
  "The Compliance Gap costs small businesses billions and can lead to losing everything.",
  "Complex legal jargon is not written for everyday people.",
  "There is a lack of local guidance or support in the user's language or context.",
  "The relevance of legal information is often unclear to users.",
  "High stakes mean one mistake can lead to business collapse.",
  "The mission is to transform complex legal requirements into simple, actionable steps.",
  "The solution is an Agentic Compliance Assistant.",
  "This Assistant ingests legal documents, understands context via dialect and photos, generates visual roadmaps, and autofills forms with export-ready results.",
  "The solution is named Rasmi AI.",
  "Rasmi AI is an Agentic compliance workflow engine.",
  "Rasmi AI provides context-aware step-by-step execution.",
  "Rasmi AI ensures reliability through persistent memory, multimodal cross-checking, and proactive error detection.",
  "Rasmi AI is built for the 90% of underserved businesses.",
  "The solution aims to democratize access and create systemic efficiency.",
  "For citizens, Rasmi AI provides a clear path, saves businesses, and reduces fear.",
  "For governments and NGOs, it offers scalable compliance support for micro-SMEs.",
  "For nations, it formalizes the informal economy and strengthens institutions.",
  "RasmiAI is presented as a solution for individuals like Ahmad facing complex legal challenges.",
  "The problem RasmiAI addresses is a systemic barrier affecting billions globally.",
  "RasmiAI aims to include the majority who are excluded by complexity."
]
```
json_data: Marcus Mah Qing Fung (Universiti Malaya) is associated with the Innovation Track presentation.
Team Wassup presented the Innovation Track.
Team Wassup members include Tan Shan Chien, Look Kai Yang, and Chiang Cheng Han, all from Universiti Malaya.
Ahmad is a small-scale contractor.
Ahmad received a 40-page legal notice about new safety and labour laws.
Ahmad has limited access to legal help and must submit five forms by Friday to avoid losing his business license.
The legal language in the notice is complex, technical, and overwhelming.
This situation represents the "Compliance Gap".
The Compliance Gap costs small businesses billions and can lead to losing everything.
Complex legal jargon is not written for everyday people.
There is a lack of local guidance or support in the user's language or context.
The relevance of legal information is often unclear to users.
High stakes mean one mistake can lead to business collapse.
The mission is to transform complex legal requirements into simple, actionable steps.
The solution is an Agentic Compliance Assistant.
This Assistant ingests legal documents, understands context via dialect and photos, generates visual roadmaps, and autofills forms with export-ready results.
The solution is named Rasmi AI.
Rasmi AI is an Agentic compliance workflow engine.
Rasmi AI provides context-aware step-by-step execution.
Rasmi AI ensures reliability through persistent memory, multimodal cross-checking, and proactive error detection.
Rasmi AI is built for the 90% of underserved businesses.
The solution aims to democratize access and create systemic efficiency.
For citizens, Rasmi AI provides a clear path, saves businesses, and reduces fear.
For governments and NGOs, it offers scalable compliance support for micro-SMEs.
For nations, it formalizes the informal economy and strengthens institutions.
RasmiAI is presented as a solution for individuals like Ahmad facing complex legal challenges.
The problem RasmiAI addresses is a systemic barrier affecting billions globally.
RasmiAI aims to include the majority who are excluded by complexity.
